title: Chicken rice
description: Balanced ModPack that Optimizes Your Game & Improves Vanilla Experience
body:
![My Perfomance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/062aa497b3b008e336d5abc04644756581f3c881_0.webp)

This ModPack adds  tons of optimization mods that make in game perfomance much better

If you love vanilla Minecraft but hate lag spikes, crashes, unplayable framerate, this pack gives you a buttery-smooth & informative experience while staying 100 % multiplayer-compatible. Perfect for anyone who wants a cleaner, faster game

Main hotkeys:
- C - Zoom, can be adjusted by scrolling mouse wheel
- G - Change gamma to maximum/lowest setting
- H - Shows light level
  
Other tips:
- Screenshots are going to clipboard
- You can hold left button while moving items
- Saturation is shown in yellow edges around food bar
